title: hedera helix subsp. poetarum
intro: Hedera helix subsp. poetarum, also known as the English ivy, is a subspecies of the common ivy plant (Hedera helix) that is native to Europe and Asia. It is an evergreen climbing plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hedera helix subsp. poetarum include reducing stress, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
